description.en: Data your organisation already generates or owns
description.zh: 您的組織已產生或擁有的資料

description.en: Data sourced from outside platforms, governments, or third parties
description.zh: 來自外部平台、政府或第三方的資料

description.en: Systems and tools that need to be in place or integrated
description.zh: 需要建置或整合的系統與工具

description.en: Organisational capabilities, expertise, and governance
description.zh: 組織能力、專業知識與治理

description.en: Full text of articles, headlines, tags, publication date, author, and category
description.zh: 文章全文、標題、標籤、發布日期、作者及類別

description.en: Photographs and video footage for identity verification and visual evidence
description.zh: 用於身份驗證和視覺證據的照片和影片

description.en: Click-through records, dwell time, reading patterns, engagement metrics, visit frequency, and session data
description.zh: 點擊記錄、停留時間、閱讀模式、互動指標、訪問頻率與工作階段資料

name.zh: 使用者個人資料／人口統計資料

description.en: Basic demographic attributes (age, location, device type) for segmentation
description.zh: 用於分群的基本人口統計屬性（年齡、地點、裝置類型）

name.zh: 使用者身份與註冊資料

description.en: Login status and first-party identity graph for cross-session behaviour linkage
description.zh: 登入狀態與第一方身份圖譜，用於跨工作階段行為連結

name.zh: 廣告庫存與活動績效資料

description.en: Historical fill rates, CPM/CPC by placement, campaign delivery logs, and unsold inventory records
description.zh: 歷史填充率、各版位CPM/CPC、活動投放日誌與未售出庫存記錄

description.en: Subscription status, plan type, payment history, renewal dates, and historical churn events
description.zh: 訂閱狀態、方案類型、付款記錄、續訂日期及流失的歷史紀錄

description.en: Articles read, comments posted, columnist follows, and content shares
description.zh: 已閱讀文章、發表評論、追蹤專欄作家、分享內容及操作層級日誌

description.en: Government registries, corporate filings, court rulings, open-data portals, and statistical datasets
description.zh: 政府登記資料、企業申報文件、法院裁決、開放資料平台與統計資料集

description.en: Government open data, statistical datasets, geographic and regional data
description.zh: 政府開放資料、統計資料集、地理與區域資料

description.en: Social media posts, third-party news sources, and wire services
description.zh: 社群媒體貼文、第三方新聞來源與通訊社報導

description.en: Google Search Console and Google Discover data including keyword rankings and click-through rates
description.zh: Google Search Console及Google Discover資料，包括關鍵字排名與點擊率

name.zh: 社群媒體平台存取與分析

description.en: Posting access and historical engagement metrics from target platforms (e.g. Facebook)
description.zh: 目標平台（如Facebook）的發文存取權限與歷史互動指標

description.en: Access to the content management system for low-latency inference
description.zh: 內容管理系統存取權，用於低延遲推論

name.zh: 實驗與提示詞版本管理

description.en: Version-controlled prompt registry to track iterations, parameter configurations, and performance data
description.zh: 具備版本控制的提示詞管理庫，用於追蹤迭代版本、參數設定與效能資料

description.en: Delivery system with permission management and dynamic frequency control per user
description.zh: 具備權限管理與每位使用者動態頻率控制的推播系統

name.zh: 向量搜尋與檢索基礎設施

description.en: Hybrid search stack (vector + keyword) with a reranking layer for RAG-based use cases
description.zh: 混合搜尋技術（向量＋關鍵字）與重新排序層，用於RAG應用情境

description.en: Data Management Platform capable of applying audience segments in ad serving
description.zh: 能夠在廣告投放中套用受眾分群的資料管理平台

description.en: Multi-dimensional creative assets with version tracking and quality-control mechanisms
description.zh: 具備版本追蹤與品質管控機制的多維度創意素材

description.en: Randomised experiment framework for assigning users to control/treatment groups
description.zh: 隨機實驗框架，用於將使用者分配至對照組／實驗組

description.en: Ability to dynamically control paywall display rules (trigger point, frequency, and messaging) based on model output in real time
description.zh: 能夠根據模型輸出，即時調整付費牆顯示規則（觸發時機、頻率與訊息）

description.en: Subject-matter experts available for fact identification, hypothesis formation, validation, and annotation
description.zh: 可用於事實識別、假設形成、驗證與標注的主題專家

description.en: A defined taxonomy for categorising reader intent and needs; must be finalised before system build
description.zh: 用於分類讀者意圖與需求的已定義分類法；必須在系統建置前確定

description.en: Documented brand standards and examples of successful headlines for prompt parameterisation
description.zh: 已記錄的品牌標準與成功標題範例，用於提示詞參數化

description.en: Pre-assessment of regulatory requirements for personalised pricing in target markets
description.zh: 目標市場個人化定價法規要求的事前評估
